rankings.title: When AI Agents Run Businesses — Lukas Petersson and Axel Backlund of Andon Labs

rankings.title: 🔬How GPT‑5 derived new results in theoretical physics and quantum gravity — Alex Lupsasca, OpenAI
summary_bullets: AI solved open physics problem stumping experts for a year.

GPT‑5.2 Pro conjectured and proved the result.
Same method extended to graviton amplitudes.
AI accelerates research but verification remains a bottleneck.

Video model gains come from language models, not diffusion.
Video agents combine LLM reasoning with generative tools.

Left xAI to focus on language model research.
